sentences.arabic: أَهْدَتِ الأُمُّ ابْنَهَا كِتَابًا فِي عِيدِ مِيلَادِهِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je poklonila sinu knjigu za njegov rođendan.
sentences.translationEn: The mother gave her son a book as a birthday gift.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْكِتَابُ عَنْ حَيَوَانَاتِ الْغَابَةِ وَالطَّبِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Knjiga je bila o šumskim životinjama i prirodi.
sentences.translationEn: The book was about forest animals and nature.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَهُ الْوَلَدُ فِي يَوْمٍ وَاحِدٍ لِأَنَّهُ أَعْجَبَهُ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Dječak ga je pročitao u jednom danu jer mu se jako svidio.
sentences.translationEn: The boy read it in one day because he liked it so much.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ مِنْ أُمِّهِ كِتَابًا آخَرَ عَنِ الطَّيُورِ.
sentences.translation: Zamolio je majku za još jednu knjigu o pticama.
sentences.translationEn: He asked his mother for another book about birds.
